data.content:
Acceptance Criteria:
Settings -> Dispatch -> Basic allows you to define the agent doing scope refinement
Settings -> Dispatch -> Advanced allows you to define a pool of agents for scope refinement
Settings allows you to define the prompt for scope refinement per project
Sensible defaults are set during application install/update/launch if settings for these new things are not found.
Newly created beats generate scope refinement jobs that go into a queue.
An asynchronous worker loop collects the jobs, builds the prompt  based on the project setting, sends to an agent based on the dispatch setting along with the beat info as entered.
Upon completion of scope refinement, a notification is generated with the beat id and a link to the beat detail.
